Makeup Classes

Hands-on makeup classes and personalized 1:1 lessons for adults, teens, and anyone looking to elevate their skills in Pittsburgh, Atlanta, and New Orleans. Learn makeup application, product selection, and techniques tailored to your features, skin tone, and the look you want to bring to life—including inclusive classes for transitioning clients.

The Newbie

$275
Perfect For: Beginners who want a natural, everyday look.
Details: 2 -hour session: Includes a basic 12 swatch color season analysis, skin + makeup consultation, full makeup application with pro kit, step-by-step guidance, customized product list emailed afterward. You do not need to bring anything but yourself for this option!

Makeup Lover

$375
Perfect For: Those who own plenty of products and want to level up
Details: 2.5 hour session: Includes a 36 swatch color season analysis. Bring your makeup bag/brushes; we combine your products with ours, demo half your face, you complete the other with our guidance, product list + recommendations emailed after.

Age Appropriate

$300
Perfect For: Anyone learning age-specific techniques or adapting to changing skin
Details: 2-hour session: Includes basic 12 swatch color analysis, skincare review, trend coaching, customized look, product list emailed after. Bring what you own + use of our professional makeup kit.

Personal Palette Profiling

See pricing below
Perfect For: Anyone looking to understand their color season and receive expert guidance on makeup and wardrobe choices that truly complement their unique palette.
What's Included:
  • 30-minute consultation (per person)
  • 36-color swatch seasonal analysis
  • Personalized makeup and wardrobe recommendations based on your color profile
  • Consultation only — no makeup application
Pricing:
  • Add-on to an existing hair/makeup service: $30
  • 30 minute Session (standalone): $50 + travel
Additional Info: Travel costs may apply when relevant. A 50% retainer is required to book all sessions.
Learn More

Hourly add-on: $75 / hour for extended practice or extra looks.

Makeup Class Logistics

  • Makeup Class & 1:1 Lessons are held at the artist's studio unless otherwise discussed/booked.
  • Color palette parties are optional artist studio or on location depending on availability.
  • Travel may be arranged; standard travel fees apply.
  • Retainer: A 50% retainer is required to book all sessions. Retainers do not roll over to new dates.

Ready to learn something new?

Let's schedule your 1:1 Makeup Lesson
